# ChatSDK Ruby

> Unified Ruby SDK for building chat bots across Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Chat, and more. Type-safe handlers, cards DSL, streaming, and pluggable adapters.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](docs/index.md)
- [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md)

## Usage

- [Usage Overview](docs/usage.md)
- [Threads, Messages & Channels](docs/threads-messages-channels.md)
- [Handling Events](docs/handling-events.md)
- [Posting Messages](docs/posting-messages.md)
- [Error Handling](docs/error-handling.md)
- [Testing](docs/testing.md)
- [Rails Integration](docs/rails.md)

## Adapters

- [Platform Adapters](docs/platform-adapters.md)
- [State Adapters](docs/state-adapters.md)

## Messaging

- [Streaming](docs/streaming.md)
- [Direct Messages](docs/direct-messages.md)
- [Ephemeral Messages](docs/ephemeral-messages.md)
- [Conversation History](docs/conversation-history.md)
- [Concurrency](docs/concurrency.md)

## Interactivity

- [Cards](docs/cards.md)
- [Modals](docs/modals.md)
- [Actions](docs/actions.md)
- [Slash Commands](docs/slash-commands.md)

- [Modals](docs/api/modals.md)
